channel.title: Homepage on Hi there
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on Hi there

item.title: Schedule Management
item.description: Need three things. Schedule mangement Like calendar Alert function To do management check up style easy to see all lists Daily summary easy to find by keyword And most important thing : Easy to access and edit in macbook, ipad, and iphone. To do so, Apple calendar and 3. Notion is the best combination. I used to work with notability or goodnotes, but the app is best option for only ipad.

item.title: 계약
item.description: 1. 등기사항전부 증명서 (등기부등본) 참고 영상 표제부 - 집 주에 대한 정보 갑구 - 소자 대한 정보 을구 - 소유권 이외 주요정보 How to check 열람일시 표제부의 주소 == 계약서 주소 갑구의 임대인 인적사항 == 계약서 인적사항 == 신분증 == 계좌주인 If one of [가압류, 압류, 가등기, 가처분] is in 갑구 => X 을구 - 근저당권 : 해당 집을 담보로 대출 받은 사항 (채권최고액 == 대출금액, 당연히 적을수록 좋음) 임차권등기명령 is in 을구 => X 2.

item.title: Flask on google
item.description: 1. Flask 2. Google Cloud https://console.cloud.google.com downkload and install https://cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/install export PATH="$PATH:/path/to/google-cloud-sdk/bin" 3. Google Cloud Storage IAM & Admin -> Service Accounts -> get key as json Cloud Storage -> Buckets

item.title: How to set mac
item.description: I’m using macbook and mac-mini. To remember what setting I used, I write some my default setting. No migration. Only Apple ID login. 0. Initial setting. Language : English Location : Korea No Migration Assistant Connect wifi and login with apple ID 1. Trackpad Silent clicking : on Tap to click : on 2. Dock Position : Left Delete all items (Remove from Dock) Turn Hiding Off 3. iCloud Nothing.

item.title: lecture recommendations
item.description: 1 . Hypothesis test What is sampling and distribution of sample mean Distribution of sample variance and chi-squared, t and F distribution P-value

item.title: nn.ModuleList vs nn.Sequential
item.description: 아예 다름 ss class ComplexModel(nn.Module): def __init__(self): super(ComplexModel, self).__init__() self.linears = nn.ModuleList([nn.Linear(10, 10) for _ in range(5)]) def forward(self, x): for linear in self.linears: x = linear(x) + x # 각 계층에 대해 특별한 작업 return x 이거를 class ComplexModel(nn.Module): def __init__(self): super(ComplexModel, self).__init__() self.linears = [nn.Linear(10, 10) for _ in range(5)] def forward(self, x): for linear in self.linears: x = linear(x) + x # 각 계층에 대해 특별한 작업 return x 이렇게 하면 안됨?

item.title: Youtube recommendations
item.description: 1. Music 1. Channels Marchen Comfort Yourself. my blue valentine All was well Blue rain_ambience music by the way essential; hello, sunset Loo Piano Violet fizz Classical Masterpieces 2.Videos Studio Ghibli Animation OST Ghibli Piano OST collection Niccolo Paganini’s Playlist Gregorian Chants 2. Study

item.title: Contacts
item.description: Phone Email QR supported by goqr

item.title: CV
item.description: curriculum vitae will be posted soon.
Links my SNU SNU Medicine SNU Biomedical UoS Portal Github Velog Musics

last update : 2023. 11. 29 Starts graduate school 2023. 09. 01 Combined Master's and Doctoral program at Seoul National University. Internship at Seoul National University. 2022. 07. 01 ~ 2023. 08. 31 Completed a one-year medical artificial intelligence research internship at Seoul National University. Eventually enrolled in an integrated Master's and Doctoral program. Bachelor's degree graduation. 2017. 03. 01 ~ 2023. 08. 22 Received a Bachelor's degree in Mathematics and Statistics through a double major at University of Seoul.
